calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Garrett Wong; Clerk: Damon Carter;
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:08a.m. to 10:34am and also at 10:46am to 10:48 a.m.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. appearing represented by Eric Jun, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Witness for Plaintiff Ben Seeman appeared via Zoom.
Defendant ESD Logistic LLC DBA E S D not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees. Court reviews declaration of counsel re: attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.
Court reviews Memorandum of Costs.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, and against Defendant ESD Logistic LLC DBA E S D, as follows:

Damages: $49,140.00
Prejudgment Interest: $11,9415.39
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $549.74
Waiting Time Penalty: $0.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $64,460.13

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Continued To Apr-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2025 Continued To Apr-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Continued To Feb-25-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Continued To Mar-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Plaintiff's Motion for Prove-Up Hearing.

Dept. 306; Judge: Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:40:24 a.m. and concluding at 09:45:50 a.m.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. represented by Eric Jun, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant ESD Logistic LLC DBA E S D Logistic LLC DBA ESD Logistics not appearing.

Plaintiff requests a continuance due to witness unavailabilty and for the opportunity to submit supplemental evidence. Plaintiff presents oral argument.

Matter is submitted.
Court orders matter continued to Mar-12-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505 for further hearing on Plaintiff's motion for prove-up hearing. Court adjourns.
